content:
fmaxf(r_out, 0.0f), 1.0f) * 255.0f));
    pixels_out[idx * 3 + 1] = (unsigned char)(__float2uint_rn(fminf(fmaxf(g_out, 0.0f), 1.0f) * 255.0f));
    pixels_out[idx * 3 + 2] = (unsigned char)(__float2uint_rn(fminf(fmaxf(b_out, 0.0f), 1.0f) * 255.0f));
}
```
